name: Hunter's Stew Dish for Royalty
recipeInstructions: (1c leftover meat may be substituted for beef/pork) Squeeze sauerkraut or, if canned, drain. In a large casserole put sauerkraut, mushrooms, apple, tomatoes, peppercorns, bay leaf and 1/4 cup water. Cover and simmer for 75 minutes. Add sausage, meat and bacon. Simmer 1 hour longer. Serve with steamed potatoes. Steamed Potatoes: Boil peeled potatoes in salted water to cover, with a spoonful of butter added. When cooked drain, add butter and teaspoon of chopped dill and let stand covered for 5 minutes.
